strengths: Extensive full-stack engineering experience across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded, cloud-native)
Proven track record in open-source contributions and entrepreneurial ventures (e.g., GISCollective)
Familiarity with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks in current role at re:cinq
concerns: Limited explicit evidence of AI/ML expertise or specialized AI products/platforms in prior roles
No advanced degrees (MS/PhD) in AI-related fields, though bachelor's in Computer Science is relevant
Recent AI-focused work appears early-stage (current role) rather than mature products or platforms
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and innovation through open-source contributions and entrepreneurial projects, with some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure. However, his expertise is more generalist than specialized in AI strategy, and his AI-related work appears to be in early stages rather than proven platforms or products. His background aligns well with engineering leadership but may lack the depth required for a Director-level AI strategy role focused on differentiation.
